dashboard.label: MCP Security Audit Trail
dashboard.description: Complete JSON-RPC audit log with security violation detection

search.query: index=trident_audit sourcetype=trident:audit security_violation=true | sort -_time | table _time, rpc_id, method, violation_type, pattern, blocked
index=trident_audit sourcetype=trident:audit | sort -_time | head 100 | table _time, rpc_id, method, params, status_code, duration_ms, security_violation
index=trident_audit sourcetype=trident:audit | timechart span=5m count by method
